ns0:entry.ns0:title: 666ghj/MiroFish
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/666ghj/MiroFish
Language: python
A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MemPalace/mempalace
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MemPalace/mempalace
Language: python
The best-benchmarked open-source AI memory system. And it's free.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Language: python
The agent that grows with you

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Open-LLM-VTuber/Open-LLM-VTuber
Language: python
Talk to any LLM with hands-free voice interaction, voice interruption, and Live2D taking face running locally across platforms

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR
Language: python
Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Panniantong/Agent-Reach
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
Language: python
Give your AI agent eyes to see the entire internet. Read & search Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, XiaoHongShu — one CLI, zero API fees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis
Language: python
LLM驱动的 A/H/美股智能分析：多数据源行情 + 实时新闻 + LLM决策仪表盘 + 多渠道推送，零成本定时运行，纯白嫖. LLM-powered stock analysis system for A/H/US markets.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jundot/omlx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jundot/omlx
Language: python
LLM inference server with continuous batching & SSD caching for Apple Silicon — managed from the macOS menu bar

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-framework
Language: python
A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mvanhorn/last30days-skill
Language: python
AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/unsloth
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
Language: python
Unsloth Studio is a web UI for training and running open models like Gemma 4, Qwen3.6, DeepSeek, gpt-oss locally.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
